name: Meal Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 large green pepper, cut into strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Prepare a 3-quart casserole dish with cooking spray and flour.
3. In a bowl, combine the browned and drained turkey, onion, and tomatoes with liquid, Worcestershire sauce, and salt.
4. Spoon the mixture into the casserole dish.
5. Layer the potatoes, flour, corn, lima beans, and green pepper on top.
6. Cover and bake for 45 minutes.
7. Sprinkle with cheese and continue baking, uncovered, for 30 minutes longer.
